title: Operations Analytics
summary: Optimise operations through analytics and modelling.
description: An applied course on process analysis, capacity, forecasting, inventory, scheduling and optimisation for operational performance.
audience: Operations, supply-chain, engineering management and business analytics students and professionals.
prerequisites: Basic quantitative methods and spreadsheet modelling.
outcomes: Analyse capacity, queues, inventory and service levels.
Recommend operational improvements using analytical evidence.

modules.title: Operational performance and process data
modules.description: Flow, capacity, productivity and service measures.

modules.title: Capacity, queues and service
modules.description: Congestion, resource decisions and service trade-offs.
